title: poa lindsayi
intro: Poa lindsayi, also known as Lindsay's blue grass or Poa lindsayi, is a species of grass native to New Zealand. It is used as a medicinal plant due to its anti-inflammatory properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues, thanks to its diuretic and expectorant properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of Poa lindsayi are often dried and made into teas or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
